The tests are hard if you don't read the text/ study beforehand, and if thats the case, you don't belong in college. He gives you everything you need to succeed in his class, you just need to work for it.

Very easy going funny guy. I didnt do the readings but im sure they would help. only 4 grades 3 exams and one 5-7 page essay each worth 25% of your grade. Class was interesting and i enjoyed the class. Tests are difficult so make sure to study, 50 multiple choice a-e on the exams, other than that not a bad professor.

I took him for psc. He requires alot of reading, lectures were interesting but most of the time he just spent on making remarks about the students, teasing but annoying. Very hard grader and Unfair grader, he grades papers like an english teacher  rather than just grade them for the content, I would NOT recomend him.

The course is interesting but his tests are EXTREMELY difficult. He said less than %50 pass his first exam. I managed a %66 on it but it was very difficult to overcome that grade even after doing well on the other tests. I would stay away from this class if you care about your gpa. Also attendance is mandatory.

His lectures are really interesting. He is really funny and he knows how to keep ur interest. He gives you three tests including the final and a book review. Basically you need to do stay on top of the reading and make sure you really know his study guides, and you should do well on his tests.

analysis.name: Richard Upchurch
analysis.verdict: Mixed reviews — experiences vary a lot between students. And trending downward
analysis.confidence_detail: Based on 31 reviews — decent sample but could shift

review_highlights.comment: It pains me to say this, but Upchurch was one of the better CS professors and I'm sad to see him go. Yes: he presented a tough exterior, had a very sarcastic wit, was intolerant of stupidity, and gave nothing back. But he saw through the BS that goes over other teachers' heads and graded, although obviously subjectively, reasonably fairly. So long.

He comes off as a Nice Guy.  But one can still worry if he is nice come grading time.  He shouldn't give 'deadlines', in today's world it doesn't work out. We'd get bad marks all the time.  I really want to do the work and learn, just wish it was more clear on what he is asking for  He says to complete a graph yet there are really not clear instruc

It's sad to think that people like this can become a college professor. He's rude to students. If you ask for extra help he just laughs at you. You'll never get any feedback unless you do something stupidly wrong, then he'll humiliate you in front of the entire class. He'll assign projects at 8am and expect you to have it done by 11, class time.

Entertaining professor, has his favorites, DO NOT get on his bad side.  Tests are extremely difficult and you wonder what exactly he is asking for.  Assignments are within reason.  Could use a grammar lesson or two before developing his slides and his tests.  At least the class was interesting.  I never knew where I stood the entire class.

Had several assignments due the portal and never mentioned it. It was your responsibility to check it regularly.  Tests were extremely difficult and you needed to remember dates and other details. No way to know how well you are doing at assignments since he never leaves feedback or grades. Doing average on the tests will not get you a C.

analysis.name: Valerie Seney
analysis.verdict: Solid pick — well-liked with reasonable difficulty. But trending upward recently
analysis.confidence_detail: Only 5 reviews — take these numbers with a grain of salt

review_highlights.comment: Awesome professor, you have to take her class!! The best at UMass

Her lectures are so interesting and she is so engaging. Just make sure you do your weekly tickets and quizzes and study her wrap-ups and you will be good! You do not need to rewrite her powerpoint, I would recommend just writing down her key points in class because the wrap-up already covers that. Would definitely take her again!!

Dr. Seney is the best professor I have had throughout nursing school. She lectures in a way that can be easily understood and is able to related content to everyday things! She is always easy to each via email and will answer any and all questions! I totally recommend taking a class with her!

She is hands down the best professor at Umass Dartmouth. Her lectures were very engaging and easy to follow. The workload was manageable and exams were very straight forward. If you have the opportunity to, I highly recommend taking a class with Dr. Seney. She is awesome!!
Prof Seney is amazing. She is one of the best Professors I've had. She is super helpful, but you have to put in the work. I would definitely take her again!

analysis.name: Vanessa Lovelace
analysis.verdict: Mixed reviews — experiences vary a lot between students. But trending upward recently
analysis.confidence_detail: Based on 24 reviews — decent sample but could shift

review_highlights.comment: Not terrible, not great either. If you don't have to take this class, don't. Her lectures are biased and not actually based on truth. Quizzes and homework are extremely easy, attendance is randomly taken. This is the type of class you take quietly, don't express your opinion since everything is based on what she believes.

Super sweet professor, She's very open, kind, and is helpful. She will notify you in advancements when needed; she will let you know a whole week in advance and a day beforehand. Overall she's super great and she keeps her lectures very interactive and interesting.

Waste of time just avoid her if you can. How is she qualified to teach? So many retakes on everything you don't have to study just look it up during the quiz. Not learning anything I haven't seen in tv shows or youtube.

weekly online quizzes with unlimited attempts. Midterm had 5 attempts, and final had 10 attempts and were online and you have multiple days to complete these. A bit lecture heavy but its one of the classes that if you just show up, you'll pass

This professor is very down to earth and makes the learning environment super fun and interesting! Lovelace is extremely knowledgeable and is always prepared to teach her students something new, her attention to detail followed by her dedication is inspirational and absolutely amazing! Her classes may be a lot of work, but it's very rewarding.

analysis.name: Valdir Miranda
analysis.verdict: Solid pick — well-liked with reasonable difficulty. And trending downward

review_highlights.comment: Great guy, quizzes + exams online and straightforward, people always forget the quizzes and he extends the date he's super nice. Homework is based on classwork. He is strict abt attendance tho and wants you to participate, be ready to read things out loud. Really funny class and it's hard to get a bad grade in his class he wants you to do well.

I loved this class, it was so fun and he is very kind and funny. He wants you to participate, and always keeps you engaged so the class is never boring. He jokes a lot and never makes you feel embarrassed for answering something wrong. It was really fun and I felt like I learnt a lot from his course. He wants students to succeed, very easy A!

Amazing and passionate professor. He loves to teach the language and you can tell the passion he has right from the get go. He wants everyone to get an A, but all he asks in return is for you to come to class and participate. Besides that the work is minimal with the quizzes being online. There is no exams or midterms whatsoever

Class is easy he is very lenient with work he just wants you to come to class and participate. He takes late work and wants everyone to get an A. Treats everyone equally and the class is interesting. Great course easy work I loved the lectures. Quizzes are online no midterm or final.

analysis.name: Milana Vasudev
analysis.verdict: Below average reviews — check if this fits your learning style
analysis.confidence_detail: Only 8 reviews — take these numbers with a grain of salt

review_highlights.comment: Prof Vasudev is a smart lady and knows her stuff but she's not very organized. She takes forever to grade and she struggles to keep up with course content. Overall found exams to be interesting and the project she had us do. She is nice and will give extensions also. I would not t take her if you can't handle a professor that is all over the place.

She as improved a lot over the past few years. Very kind now an she has a lot of information to give. Let her know if you need an extension, it is likely granted. Her classes have a lot of information on the slides and to digest, but her tests encourage you to think and understand what you learned, instead of asking you to memorize the information.

Very fast speaking professor, and has a thick Indian accent that at times is very hard to understand. She does not slow down and expects students to understand things the way she understands them. Homework questions are also not covered in the classes. Would not take another class with her again.

She has a thick accent and does not answer questions well. She will lecture a lot, and give 7-8 homework assignments, but they are difficult to do off of the powerpoint only. The lab section of this class has long lab reports, do not procrastinate or you will fall behind in the lab. Also had a difficult to understand TA that teaches the labs.

Looks to take off points, instead of to grade them. Basically wants you to memorize lectures and regurgitate the information. Don't bother answering questions in your own words she'll take points off and rewrite the answer you wrote in her words. Speaks very softly, hard to understand her in class.

analysis.name: Yibin Wei
analysis.verdict: Below average reviews — check if this fits your learning style
analysis.confidence_detail: Based on 57 reviews — fairly reliable

review_highlights.comment: Prof Wei is a greatly good person, but he's hard to understand and his exams are so hard. But you can probably try if you study and got to tutoring an learn some of the concepts. But you must actually study to pass this class and put the effort because it's also very easy fail this class too.
In my class, we didn't have to do a final exam, if we wanted he would average out our exams over the semester and that would be our final exam grade.

Chemistry is my worst subject in general, but the fact that English is definitely not his first language and his unclear pronunciation of things made this class even harder for me to take. I basically had to not only try to understand chemistry, but also translate what he was saying. It was awful. Going to him for extra help didn't help either.

Professor Wei is a very reasonable man. Although he has a thick accent, I highly recommend taking his class and visiting him during office hours; he's always willing to help. If you do all of the work, attend class, and use his notes/powerpoints to study, you'll do fine. I never used the book and ended up receiving an A in the class. Go Wei!

Professor Wei's class is not easy and you will have to put in the work to pass, but he always offers extra credit on exams and even allows cheat sheets in the final. Genuinely really kind and caring and his rating on here is way too low. Don't blame your inability to work hard and put in the effort to understand concepts on his accent!

analysis.name: Suzanne Wimberly
analysis.verdict: Excellent choice — highly rated and manageable workload
analysis.confidence_detail: Based on 43 reviews — fairly reliable

review_highlights.comment: Professor Wimberly is one of the best English teachers I've ever had. Her energy and positivity are contagious, and her lectures are thoughtful. Classwork is easy, and she's very generous when it comes to grading & late work. She's responsive and always available to answer any questions. I'd absolutely take her again; best professor for a 1st year

Shes awesome! Shes nice& a softy when it comes to passing things in late& redoing projects. My only reason for a 4 star is that she doesnt post your grades & can take a very long time to respond to email if at all. I havent really known my grade all semester, she just says you got an A and not much more to it, but she is always ready to help!

Professor Wimberly is so so so kind! her class is very easy with only 4 major assignments. she's super lenient about due dates. every question I've had she's been able to give me exactly the answer I needed. she tends to overexplain for how simple the class/assignments are though.

She is very nice, this class was pretty easy, we used the book everyday, we have quizzes every week on a poem that we read, but we always went over the poem before the test and you could use the book during the test. Really laid back setting, I didn't need to take much notes

Great professor.  She is always willing to help.  She gives 6 absences.  None of the due dates are official except that everything is due by the end of the semester, but she doesn't mention that.  I would definitely take her again.

analysis.name: Wilbur Higgins
analysis.verdict: Excellent choice — highly rated and manageable workload. But trending upward recently
analysis.confidence_detail: Based on 56 reviews — fairly reliable

review_highlights.comment: I'm genuinely sad he doesn't teach more English classes here, 10/10 absolutely would take again no hesitation. Instruction is clear and concise while not being obtuse or pretentious, and the instructor clearly knows his subject well. Principled but not inflexible, I could not recommend him more.

One of the best professor's I have had so far. Professor is very knowledgeable in this field, and he cares about his work. Attendance is mandatory to a limit (no less than 6 absent). Overall a must take class under this professor. Very easy grading. 
You will not regret it :)
Have fun!!

Such an amazing professor and even better guy. Professor Higgins makes you want to put full effort into the course by making all the readings and papers (no matter how obscure) seem so interesting. None of the topics covered are ever noting either. Taking him again for ENL102 even though it's a late class because he's the GOAT
He makes a lot of jokes that are very funny! All of the quizzes are open notes. No tests, finals, or midterms! Only 3 major assignments for the whole semester!

Mr. Higgins is a very smart man who makes learning about english relatively enjoyable. There was 3 major essays and a few quizzes on readings through out the semester, I AM NOT a enjoyer of writing especially long formatted essays but his step by step. process makes it digestible.

review_highlights.comment: One of my favorite professors I've had at UMASSD. His workload is manageable and he's an easy grader. He gives great feedback and is very considerate of student's outside lives and circumstances. I would absolutely take a course with him again.

Prof Downey is an absolute delight of a Professor. He is very understanding when it comes to the individual needs of students. Very passionate about his course material, which is very refreshing for a lecture-based course.

Walker Downey has been my professor for 3 semesters in Art History. He is an easy grader, he doesn't judge and he is ready to help you when you ask for it. I never had trouble in his class and always passed with an A/A+. His lectures can be pretty long, but it is worth it since he is so passionate in his field of work. You will 100% pass!
